auth.title: Bosch Smart Home Camera — Login
auth.description:
**Step 1:** Open the link below in your browser and log in with your Bosch SingleKey ID:

[Open Bosch Login]({auth_url})

**Step 2:** After logging in, the browser shows a **404 page** — that is expected.

**Step 3:** Copy the full URL from the browser address bar (starts with `https://www.bosch.com/boschcam?code=...`) and paste it below.

data.redirect_url: Redirect URL (paste the full URL from the browser)

error.invalid_redirect_url: Could not find an auth code in the URL. Make sure you paste the full URL starting with https://www.bosch.com/boschcam?code=...
error.token_exchange_failed: Token exchange failed. The code may have expired — try again.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Bosch servers. Check your internet connection.

abort.already_configured: Bosch Smart Home Camera is already configured.

init.title: Bosch Camera — Options
init.description:
Configure the integration. Token renewal is automatic via saved refresh token.

{relogin_desc}

data.enable_sensors: Enable status & event sensors (Status / Last Event / Events Today)
data.enable_snapshot_button: Enable control buttons (Refresh Snapshot / Open Live Stream)
data.enable_auto_download: Auto-download all event files in background

relogin.title: Bosch Smart Home Camera — Re-login
relogin.description:
**Step 1:** Open the link below in your browser and log in with your Bosch SingleKey ID:

[Open Bosch Login]({auth_url})

**Step 2:** After logging in, the browser shows a **404 page** — that is expected.

**Step 3:** Copy the full URL from the browser address bar (starts with `https://www.bosch.com/boschcam?code=...`) and paste it below.

data.redirect_url: Redirect URL (paste the full URL from the browser)

error.invalid_redirect_url: Could not find an auth code in the URL. Make sure you paste the full URL starting with https://www.bosch.com/boschcam?code=...
error.token_exchange_failed: Token exchange failed. The code may have expired — try again.

trigger_snapshot.name: Trigger Snapshot Refresh
trigger_snapshot.description: Force an immediate snapshot refresh for all Bosch cameras.

open_live_connection.name: Open Live Connection
open_live_connection.description: Open a live stream proxy connection for a Bosch camera.

camera_id.name: Camera ID
camera_id.description: Cloud ID of the camera (e.g. xxxxxxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx)
